title: tabebuia pallida subsp. dominicensis
intro: Tabebuia pallida subsp. dominicensis, also known as the Pink Trumpet Tree, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Bignoniaceae. The medicinal properties of Tabebuia pallida subsp. dominicensis include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Tabebuia pallida subsp. dominicensis can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including colds, flu, and skin conditions.
